description: Create a reusable Display Filter Macro in Wireshark to analyze TCP quality issues. The macro must be named 'tcp_bad_quality' with the filter text 'tcp.analysis.retransmission || tcp.analysis.fast_retransmission || tcp.analysis.spurious_retransmission'. Apply this macro to the capture file '~/Documents/captures/200722_tcp_anon.pcapng' and record the total number of matching packets as an integer in '~/Documents/packet_count.txt'.
